name: Seller Assistant
description: Seller assistant tools for pricing, RFQ replies, inventory checks, and campaign planning.

currency.description: Display currency fallback used when a tool output does not have an explicit business currency from source data, such as quote drafts or manual-input planning contexts.

locale.description: Display locale used for formatted tool output.

targetMarginFloorPct.description: Optional configured gross-margin floor percentage used for quote guardrails and discount / clearance decision checks. Values must stay below 100.

lowInventoryDays.description: Inventory days-of-cover threshold that triggers low-stock warnings.

decisionPolicy.description: Optional policy overrides for replenishment, discount, and clearance thresholds.

weakDemandDailySalesThreshold.description: Average daily sales below this threshold count as weak demand.

healthyDemandDailySalesThreshold.description: Average daily sales at or above this threshold count as healthy demand.

insufficientDataMinLookbackDays.description: Lookbacks shorter than this are treated as insufficient demand data.

insufficientDataMinUnitsSold.description: Positive sales volumes below this threshold are treated as insufficient demand data.

discountMinInventoryDays.description: Inventory cover must reach at least this many days before markdown testing is considered.

clearanceMinInventoryDays.description: Inventory cover must reach at least this many days before clearance review is considered.

clearanceStrongSignalInventoryDays.description: Inventory cover at or above this threshold is treated as strong aged-stock pressure for replenishment, discount, and clearance decisions.

veryLowLookbackUnitsFactor.description: Multiplier used to derive the very-low-sales threshold for strong clearance signals from lookback days.

responseTone.description: Shared response tone for seller-facing draft outputs.

defaultStoreId.description: Store profile to use when the user does not specify a store.

stores.description: Configured seller stores grouped by platform.

id.description: Local identifier for this Shopify store profile.

name.description: Display name for this Shopify store profile.

storeDomain.description: The merchant-owned *.myshopify.com store domain where the merchant's own Shopify app is installed.

clientId.description: Client id of the merchant-owned Shopify app used for this store. This plugin does not provide a shared public Shopify app.

clientSecretEnv.description: Environment variable name on the OpenClaw host that contains the merchant-owned Shopify app client secret.

operations.description: Store-level operational inputs for replenishment and sales lookback behavior.

supplierLeadDays.description: Optional supplier lead time in days for replenishment decisions on this store.

safetyStockDays.description: Optional safety stock buffer in days for replenishment decisions on this store.

salesLookbackDays.description: Optional sales lookback window in days for Shopify-backed sales and product decisions on this store.
